name: Tag Swap!
description: Swap ALL your tags with a randomly chosen player.

name: Tag Thief!
description: Steal one tag from any player of your choice.

name: Double Trouble!
description: Spin again and add a SECOND tag. You must embody BOTH during tasks.

name: Generous Gift
description: Give your most recent tag to any player.

name: Plot Armor!
description: Your tags CANNOT be called out during your next task.

name: Musical Tags!
description: Everyone passes ALL their tags to the player on their left.

name: Wild Card!
description: Choose any adjective from the full list — pick your favorite!

name: Audience Choice!
description: All other players each suggest a tag for you. The most popular one sticks.
